We wanted 


a multi player as

developer_response.body: Hi, please write to our discord, let's see the problem

reviews.review_description: There is no working multi player component

developer_response.body: Hi, please write us on discord, let's see the problem

reviews.review_description: While the gameplay against the bots is fun, where this game should really shine is the multiplayer component. Unfortunately, this is where the game really comes up short. Multiplayer with friends is simply not functional. This is where a good tutorial or an in-depth explanation of the various UI elements might have come in handy. Sadly, the current in-game tutorial only covers the basic controller functions and little else. Online support and resources are equally lacking. After troubleshooting for 2-hours we unfortunately surpassed the refund eligibility time. This game has potential but needs a major coat of polish.

developer_response.body:
Hi, Write to me on discord, I'll try to solve the problem

https://discord.gg/4hBfGD4cXc

reviews.review_description: Can’t invite friends.

developer_response.body: Enter the same code or just click search at the same time, the game will be found

reviews.review_description: I can’t get the app to do anything. Out $10.00!!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We're really sorry to hear you had a frustrating experience. Please join us on our Discord - we'd love to help get things working smoothly for you.
https://discord.gg/aZPkK22ZpG

Let us know the specific issues you encountered so we can address them properly.

reviews.review_title: Best air hockey table game out!
reviews.review_description: Ultimate Air Hockey is just that. The ultimate air hockey game. This game puts you right into the action from the get go against an AI opponent which is surprisingly good. If your a fan of air hockey this opponent gives you a really good challenge and its impressive to see the intelligence and skill it uses towards you to play. You definitely need to put in effort in order to beat it which is great. This game has several options as far as customization for the puck which it allows trails which reminded me of the old school nhl fox tracks where the puck would glow on the tv lol. There is also some cool striker unlocks that let you choose from a few options i stead of the plain red and blue. The environment have a few scenes to choose from as well. What is really impressive is the use of passthrough which puts you in your own environment to have your own air hockey table at your house which i truly enjoyed. This game is great for any hockey fan and is a must download!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! It warms our hearts!

reviews.review_description: Great game it looks pretty good it works well on multiplayer the only reason why its not 5 stars is that the table is not a physical object so when using the thing to hit the puck sometimes it just goes right through the table and it can be a little annoying but other than that great game

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We are still in the development process. We have a code with a variant when the bit does not pass through the table, but it does not work well. As soon as we can work it out, we'll roll it out right away.

reviews.review_description:
Easy to understand instructions, different backgrounds available and perfect air hockey physics.

Recommended.
Played like in real life :)

I think this will be a great game to play with friends. It will be a nice chill game to play. Since it's still in development there are a few bugs to fix but I'm looking forward to seeing the end product.
One issue that could be better is that the handle shouldn't be able to go through the table to make it easier to play and more like reality

developer_response.body: the bat/mallet no longer passes through the table. Patch 0.0.81 :)

reviews.review_description: ITs a very fun game i havent met any problems yet i would reacomend it

reviews.review_title: Fun game with lots of potential
reviews.review_description: I’ve only played it a little bit so far, but it’s fun. I look forward to the 2-4 multiplayer function and trying that out with family. Super excited about that feature. Couple of quirks that I experienced that impacted my experience was that the strikers at the table were moving around playing a game when the game loaded and as a result I had difficulty at times with grabbing the striker as it moved around the table on its own and the minute I let go of the striker it would start moving again on its own playing against the AI. The other thing that impacted my experience was the striker being able to go through the table when the controller was lowered rather than being fixed to the table. If those two things were addressed, I’d say for the price it’d be 5 stars. Great work!

developer_response.body:
Thanks :)
Hold X on left controller and bots will be disabled for 3 seconds, so you can grab them (hints in tutorial says about it :D ).
And yes, we are thinking about what to do with the movement through the table, until we get good solutions - physical hands work great anywhere, except in places where objects are supposed to rub against each other.

reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing game I have spent countless hours playing. I would definitely recommend it for the price!


Search this into google for 25% off loads of games: htps://linktree/jack.lcfc (add a t to the start making it say https and add a full stop in between the “r” and “e” in the word tree)

I hope you have a good day!

reviews.review_title: A great multiplayer air hockey game
reviews.review_description: Me and my friends play this quite a bit, the gameplay works fine, the graphics are fine, but thing that makes it so great is how fun it is, especially when you play with friends. You can also have up to 5 picks on the table at once, which can be quite chaotic but fun. Would definitely recommend to other people.

This can be a good game, and it is worth the money, its actually really cheap. The problem it faces is not the game mechanics, its about not getting enough people to actually play multiplayer. Very hard to find games but its possible. The only main problem I have disliked is the handle goes through the board. It would be nice if it could just stay on the board.

developer_response.body: the bat/mallet no longer passes through the table. Patch 0.0.81 :)

reviews.review_description: This game is an absolutely amazing recreation of irl air hockey. The gameplay and physics make it one of the best sports games out there, keep up the work 🙂
Amazing but it needs more players, finding matches with real people is hard, but the AI is good and so are the physics. I feel once it gets a bit bigger it would be perfect.

Even though it's just airhockey, it somehow feels like way more than just that. The game is extremely fun, you can play it with either an AI or your friends. Sometimes, there are tournaments. Bugs are really hard to find. The developer team is also really great, you can talk to them on their discord server if you want. Either way, 10/10 game, love it.

reviews.review_title: Good enough for a giveaway game
reviews.review_description:
It's a simple Air Hockey VR.
It doesn't have neither a big variety of maps, nor intresting modes. In current state the game doesn't have much players and all you can do there is wait there for 30 minutes looking for a player. Although i have to admit, it is fun to play with a random stranger that owns you completely(i am not a masochist i swear).

Also 3x3 meters space is more than enough, so you don't have to worry about space

I had a lot of fun in the game, the game itself is fun and full of friendly users. I played with one of the developers and he taught me ways I could make the game different and even better sometimes. I highly recommend this game
